overlap_notes: RISK pediatric rectal RNA-seq row. GSE117993 contains 190 pediatric diagnostic rectal biopsies, with sample titles explicitly labeled RISK_Rectal_* across CD, UC, and non-IBD groups. Same RISK study family as DS041/GSE93624, but public GEO records do not provide a direct subject-ID crosswalk proving whether DS040 rectal samples overlap DS041 ileal samples. Do not count DS040 and DS041 as definitely independent cohorts without subject-level confirmation.

RISK pediatric ileal Crohn RNA-seq row. GSE93624 contains ileal expression at diagnosis from 210 treatment-naive pediatric Crohn disease patients and 35 non-IBD controls from the RISK study, with 3-year complication follow-up. Same RISK family as DS040/GSE117993, but public records do not prove exact subject/sample overlap with the rectal RISK row. External non-row RISK ileal records GSE62207/GSE101794 appear same-family and have reported duplication risk in secondary literature, but they are not current CSV rows.
